mapper.select:
SELECT t.task_id, t.task_name, t.creator AS creatorId, t.creation_time, t.project_id, t.simulation_stage, t.type, t.compute_resource, t.status, t.server_id, t.server_name, t.priority, t.cpu_core_need, t.memory_need, t.progress, t.start_time, t.end_time, t.error_msg, u.username AS creator FROM mod_tasks t LEFT JOIN mod_users u ON t.creator = u.user_id LEFT JOIN mod_projects p ON t.project_id = p.project_id WHERE t.project_id = #{projectId} AND p.project_status = 0
AND ( t.task_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
ORDER BY t.creation_time DESC

SELECT t.task_id, t.task_name, t.creator AS creatorId, t.creation_time, t.project_id, t.simulation_stage, t.type, t.status, t.compute_resource, t.server_id, t.server_name, t.priority, t.cpu_core_need, t.memory_need, t.progress, t.start_time, t.end_time, t.error_msg, u.username AS creator FROM mod_tasks t LEFT JOIN mod_users u ON t.creator = u.user_id LEFT JOIN mod_projects p ON t.project_id = p.project_id WHERE t.project_id = #{projectId} AND p.project_status = 1
AND ( t.task_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
ORDER BY t.creation_time DESC
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM mod_tasks t WHERE t.`type` = #{type} AND t.status IN ('running', '仿真中')
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM mod_tasks t WHERE t.status = 'running'

SELECT t.task_id, t.task_name, t.creator AS creatorId, t.creation_time, t.project_id, t.simulation_stage, t.type, t.status, t.compute_resource, t.server_id, t.server_name, t.priority, t.cpu_core_need, t.memory_need, t.progress, t.start_time, t.end_time, t.error_msg, u.username AS creator FROM mod_tasks t LEFT JOIN mod_users u ON t.creator = u.user_id WHERE t.status = 'pending' AND t.server_id IS NOT NULL AND t.priority IS NOT NULL ORDER BY t.priority ASC, t.creation_time ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE mod_tasks SET server_id = #{serverId}, server_name = #{serverName}, priority = #{priority}, progress = 0, error_msg = NULL WHERE task_id = #{taskId} AND status = 'pending' AND server_id IS NULL

UPDATE mod_tasks SET status = 'running', server_id = #{serverId}, server_name = #{serverName}, start_time = NOW(), progress = 0, error_msg = NULL WHERE task_id = #{taskId} AND status = 'pending' AND server_id IS NOT NULL AND priority IS NOT NULL
UPDATE mod_tasks SET status = 'completed', progress = 100, end_time = NOW(), error_msg = NULL WHERE task_id = #{taskId} AND status = 'running'
mapper.select: SELECT status, COUNT(1) AS count FROM mod_tasks GROUP BY status
mapper.update: UPDATE mod_tasks SET status = 'failed', end_time = NOW(), error_msg = #{errorMsg} WHERE status = 'running'
